texto: I detest jokes - when somebody tells me one, I feel my IQ dropping; the brain cells start to disappear. texto: I don't think it's anything you ever get used to... for many years, I could never sort of put my name in the same sort of category as the word 'famous' or anything like that. And I just found it very uncomfortable... if you get used to it, then something must be wrong.
